passes.title: The Aviation Museum Of New Hampshire
passes.benefit_text:
Print from home pass.
Pass is for free admission for a family to Bedrock Gardens (not special events).
-Valid on date of admission only.
-To be turned in on admission.
-More information can be found at www.bedrockgardens.org.

passes.title: Bedrock Gardens
passes.benefit_text:
Pass may be printed from home or presented on a smart phone.
Pass admits up to 4 people at 1/2 price admission.
Pre-purchase your discounted tickets online.
Coupon only good for date listed.
Please check the museum website for current hours.

passes.title: Boston Childrens Museum
passes.benefit_text:
Print from home pass.
50 % discount for up to 4 tickets.
For Tickets: www.bostonharborislands.org/ferry-tickets/
Select a date to visit Spectacle Island or Georges Island
Select up to 4 tickets then continue to Booking Details
Enter the library's unique code found printed on the pass in the "Coupon/Voucher Code" field and click apply
source_phrases: Print from home pass.
50 % discount for up to 4 tickets.
For Tickets: www.bostonharborislands.org/ferry-tickets/
Select a date to visit Spectacle Island or Georges Island
Select up to 4 tickets then continue to Booking Details
Enter the library's unique code found printed on the pass in the "Coupon/Voucher Code" field and click apply
Complete your transaction & bring your phone or printed copy of your barcode to board the ferry
Summer Schedule: June 20 – September 2, 2024
Boston to Spectacle Island: Monday through Friday
Boston to Georges Island: Monday through Friday
Hingham to Peddocks Island: Monday through Friday
Fall Schedule: September 5 – September 22
Boston to Georges Island: Thursday through Sunday
End of Season Schedule: September 27 – October 11
Boston to Georges Island: Friday through Sunday

Admits up to 4 at $5 off each admission

passes.title: The Discovery Museums
passes.benefit_text:
Pick up coupon pass at library.
Admits 4 people at 50%.
Admission good for Harvard Museum of Natural History and Peabody Museum of Archaeology & Ethnology (hours daily 9 AM-5 PM), The Harvard Museum of Ancient Near East and Collection of Historic Scientific Instruments ( hours Sunday -Friday 11AM- 4PM)

passes.title: Harvard Museums Of Science And Culture
passes.benefit_text:
Pick up coupon at library.
Pass will admit 2 adults and children under 18 years old.
Go to HistoricNewEngland.org for list of properties.
Each property has their own days and hours they are open. 
Reservations can be made at several locations for the day you have the pass reserved.

passes.title: Historic New England
passes.benefit_text:
Pick up coupon pass at the library.
Patrons receive 50% off admission for up to 4 people.
Patrons must purchase tickets online in advance at 7gables.org using LIBRARYPATRON promo code.
Pass  must accompany tickets.
source_phrases: Pick up coupon pass at the library.

Pass  must accompany tickets.

passes.title: The House Of Seven Gables
passes.benefit_text:
Print from home pass. 
Pass allows 2 people at $10 per person (if you book more, the museum will charge you the balance upon entry).
Reserve your timed-tickets in advance on the ICA website at www.icaboston.org and select the "Library Pass Discount" price or call ICA Visitor Services at 617-478-3100.
Present your printed passes at the Visitor Services desk to purchase tickets onsite.
Visitors must present their e-ticket along with their paper library pass when checking in at the museum.
Please note that purchases made on the ICA website or over the phone incur a $4 service fee per ticket.

passes.title: Institute Of Contemporary Art Boston
passes.benefit_text:
Pick up pass from Library
Pass will allow up to 4 people admission at $5 per person.
It is recommended to purchase tickets ahead of time. Pass alone does not guarantee admission.

passes.title: Isabella Stewart Gardner Museum
passes.benefit_text:
Pick up and return pass to library.
Pass may be picked up the day before use.
Pass must be returned no later than the day after use.
Pass allows 1 car and passengers into the state park or beach.
Pass is for day use only and CANNOT be used for camping.
Only Andover residents may reserve and use this pass.

passes.title: Massachusetts State Parks Department Of Conservation And Recreation
passes.benefit_text:
Print from home pass.
A library pass will not be accepted for admission to the Museum. Bring the code or printed pass to use onsite to reserve same-day tickets.
Each pass admits 2 adults for $10 each (general admission and special exhibition) and up to 4 children ages 7 – 17 for $10 each (special exhibition only). There is no discount for general admission for children ages 7-17 (cost is $10/ticket). Children age 6 and under are free.
source_phrases: Print from home pass.
A library pass will not be accepted for admission to the Museum. Bring the code or printed pass to use onsite to reserve same-day tickets.

Each pass admits 2 adults for $10 each (general admission and special exhibition) and up to 4 children ages 7 – 17 for $10 each (special exhibition only). There is no discount for general admission for children ages 7-17 (cost is $10/ticket). Children age 6 and under are free.

passes.title: Museum Of Fine Arts
passes.benefit_text:
Print from home pass.
This pass will admit up to 4 people at a 50% discount on tickets to the Museum’s Exhibit Halls. Children under 3 are not included in the count of 4 and are always admitted for free.
Your Library pass can only be used on the date printed on the pass.
Please bring your library pass confirmation (printed or displayed on a phone) when you visit.
When you arrive at the Museum, stop at the Box Office to exchange your library pass and purchase your Exhibit Halls tickets at the discounted rate. If you have any questions or would like to reserve your Exhibit Halls passes in advance to avoid waiting in line the day of your visit, please call 617-723-2500 (9:00 a.m. – 5:00 p.m. daily).
Code of Conduct for MOS- https://www.mos.org/visit/code-of-conduct

passes.title: Museum Of Science
passes.benefit_text:
Print from home pass.
This coupon allows 50% off admission for 4 people to the New England Aquarium.
Only applies to adult and child pricing.
This is not a ticket.
Redeem this coupon in the General Admission line at the Aquarium’s ticket booth for discounted admission for up to 4 people.
Please visit neaq.org/coupons for details.
source_phrases: Print from home pass.
This coupon allows 50% off admission for 4 people to the New England Aquarium.
Only applies to adult and child pricing.
This is not a ticket.
Redeem this coupon in the General Admission line at the Aquarium’s ticket booth for discounted admission for up to 4 people.
Please visit neaq.org/coupons for details.
Review the Aquarium’s website at www.neaq.org/safety ahead of your visit to ensure a safe and accessible experience.
Valid only for Aquarium admission.
This coupon does not provide any other discounts and cannot be applied to combo tickets.
Library coupons or tickets obtained with library coupons may not be sold.
Void if altered or copied. No cash value.
Hours of operation are subject to change.

passes.title: New England Aquarium
passes.benefit_text:
Pick up and return pass to the library.
Pass admits 2 people at 1/2 price.
Online pre-reservations are no longer required for general admission visits.  Online pre-registration tickets are still available for those that would like to purchase tickets in advance  at www.towerhillbg.org/planyourvisit using access code LIBDI
Pick up the library pass the day before your visit. You will need to show it AND your booked tickets upon arrival at the Garden.

passes.title: North Shore Childrens Museum
source_phrases: Print from home

This coupon must be presented to Plimoth Patuxet Museums guest services staff upon arrival at the Museum for Memorial Hall Library patrons to purchase a Heritage Pass, Combination Pass, or Plimoth Patuxet Only pass for up to six individuals at the reduced rate of $16 per adult; $10 per child ages 5-17.
This coupon is for one time use only by the patron.

passes.title: Plimoth Patuxet Museums
passes.benefit_text:
Pick up and return pass to library.
Pass admits up to 6 people discounted admission.
Advanced ticket purchase is required.  Please visit the website www.salemwitchmuseum.com to purchase your tickets and enter the code from the pass into the coupon code box to receive discount.
Pass MUST be presented at time of admission or full price will be charged.
Open Daily 10 am to 5 pm
July and August open daily 10 am to 7 pm

Admission with pass: Adult/Senior: $14 (regular admission: $19/$17.50)
Child: $11.75 (regular admission: $16)

passes.title: Salem Witch Museum
passes.benefit_text:
Print from home.
Pass admits 2 adults and up to 4 children/grandchildren into the Seacoast Science Center at 50% off the cost of regular admission.
Pass holder receives 10% discount in the Nature Store
Library pass does NOT include the State Park admission. Park fees are $4 per adult (ages 12+) and $2 per child (ages 6-11) .
Office use only:   _____#adults     _____#children     _____# under3       _____ # seniors

passes.title: Wenham Museum
source_phrases: Pick up coupon at library.
Pass allows up to 6 people discounted admission ($9.00/adult and $6.00/child) to the Stone Zoo or the Franklin Park Zoo
Library coupon holders are no longer required to make a timed ticket reservation. Patrons may walk in with the library coupon and purchase tickets for the discounted rate.
